channel.title: Static-Site on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Static-Site on Pi Stack

item.title: Best Self-Hosted Static Site Generators 2026: Hugo vs Jekyll vs Astro vs Eleventy
item.description: Building a website in 2026 doesn’t require a database, a backend framework, or monthly SaaS subscriptions. Static site generators (SSGs) take plain text files — Markdown, HTML, templates — and compile them into fast, secure, deployable HTML. They’re the backbone of thousands of self-hosted blogs, documentation sites, portfolios, and company landing pages.
